name: Optimal Adaptive v1
description: Experimental candidate from the 2026-04-24 optimal search. Uses a tighter 3% base width, trend/RSI-aware target width, and width-only in-range refresh. It materially beats the current optimal on the corrected full-year backtest and also improves the 6x30d window mean versus the current optimal, though the short-window annualised APRs remain volatile and need a broader walk-forward before promotion.

backtest_results.notes: Short 30d annualised windows remain noisy after the IL-accounting correction. This file is intentionally experimental and should not replace strategy_optimal.json without a broader walk-forward confirmation.
